text: How often do you voluntarily join scheduled virtual study sessions?
How well can you maintain focus during an online group study call?

options.label: Extremely well – I stay engaged throughout
Somewhat – I drift but refocus quickly
Very poorly – I can barely follow along

text: When working remotely, how easily do you stick to a study schedule?

options.label: Very easily – I follow my schedule strictly
Sometimes – I often revise my schedule
Rarely – my schedule breaks down often
Never – I have no real schedule

text: How often do environmental distractions (noise, family, phone) interrupt your remote study?

options.label: Never – my study space is distraction-free
Sometimes – a few times per session
Always – my environment is very disruptive

text: How comfortable do you feel contributing verbally in virtual study groups?

options.label: Very comfortable – I actively lead discussions

text: How effectively do you use digital tools (shared docs, whiteboards, chat) during virtual study?

options.label: Very effectively – I drive tool usage
Somewhat – I use them when prompted
Not at all – I struggle with digital tools

text: After a virtual study session, how productive do you feel compared to in-person study?
How often do you experience screen fatigue during or after virtual study sessions?

options.label: Rarely – only after very long sessions
Always – even short sessions exhaust me

text: How well do you retain information from virtual study sessions versus self-study?
How often do you feel socially disconnected or isolated when studying remotely?

options.label: Always – remote study feels very isolating

text: How frequently do you take planned breaks during a remote study session?

options.label: Always – I use structured break methods (e.g., Pomodoro)
Usually – I take breaks every 45–60 min
Rarely – I forget to take breaks
Never – I study until I burn out

text: How well can you manage technical issues (poor Wi-Fi, software glitches) without losing focus?

options.label: Very well – I resolve them quickly and refocus
Well – minor frustration but I recover
Moderately – technical issues disrupt my flow
Poorly – they derail my entire session
Very poorly – I give up and stop studying

text: How motivated do you feel to study when joining a virtual session compared to studying alone?

options.label: Much more motivated in virtual sessions

text: How often do you find yourself multitasking (e.g., social media, gaming) during virtual study?

options.label: Never – I stay fully on task
Always – I’m constantly doing something else

text: Overall, how satisfied are you with your ability to learn effectively in virtual/remote settings?
